name: Nancy Davis — marriage to William Brewer
researcher_question: When and where did Nancy Davis (born 1837 in Tennessee, of Newton County, Missouri) marry her husband William James Brewer?
notes: Record-hint fixture (filtered-list-samples.csv row 1, flag adds_marriage, confidence 3). Findings are a DRAFT transcribed from the hint record (Missouri Marriages 1750-1920: William Bremer / Nancy Angeline Davis, 12 May 1868, Newton County), whose identity with the tree couple (surname Brewer) is unverified — roughly half the records in this hint batch are false matches. Genealogist adjudication must confirm the match, revise the findings, or convert this to a no-findable-answer fixture.
